title: 9 Herbal Creams for Gum Disease Sufferers with Bad Breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus creams are known to help with bad breath due to their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of eucalyptus globulus, such as eucalyptol and cineole, have been shown to reduce the growth of bacteria that cause bad breath. These compounds also help to reduce inflammation in the mouth and gums, which can contribute to bad breath.  To use eucalyptus globulus creams for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue, gums, and teeth, using a gentle circular motion. You can also use a toothbrush to apply the cream to your teeth and gums.  After using the cream, you may notice a reduction in bad breath. You may also experience a cooling sensation in your mouth and gums. Additionally, regular use of eucalyptus globulus creams may help to prevent future episodes of bad breath. However, if you have underlying dental issues or gum disease, you should consult a dentist before using eucalyptus globulus creams.
remedies.image_alt: Eucalyptus globulus herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinnamomum zeylanicum creams can help with bad breath due to its antibacterial properties. The cream contains cinnamaldehyde, a key constituent that has been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria in the mouth, which is often the cause of bad breath. Cinnamaldehyde also has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent the irritation that can lead to bad breath.  To use Cinnamomum zeylanicum cream for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue and gums after brushing your teeth. You can also add a few drops of cinnamomum oil to your toothpaste or mouthwash for extra benefits.  When using Cinnamomum zeylanicum cream, you may notice a reduction in bad breath within a few days. You may also experience a fresher and cleaner mouth sensation. Some people may also notice a reduction in plaque and gum inflammation. However, it's essential to note that individual results may vary, and it's always best to consult with a dentist or healthcare professional before trying any new remedies.
remedies.image_alt: Cinnamomum zeylanicum herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia creams, also known as tea tree oil creams, can help with bad breath due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of these creams, including cinnamaldehyde and terpinen-4-ol, have been shown to reduce the growth of bacteria in the mouth, which is often the cause of bad breath. These compounds also have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the gums and mouth, making it easier to breathe fresh. To use Melaleuca alternifolia creams for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue and gums after brushing your teeth. You can also use it as a mouthwash by swishing the cream around in your mouth for about 30 seconds before spitting it out. It's recommended to use the cream after meals or when you notice bad breath.  When using the cream, you can expect to see a reduction in bad breath, as well as a decrease in inflammation and swelling in the mouth and gums. Some people may also notice an improvement in their gum health, with reduced bleeding and sensitivity. However, it's essential to note that the effectiveness of the cream may vary depending on the individual and the severity of the bad breath. As with any new product, it's also recommended to do a patch test before using it extensively to ensure you don't have any sensitivity or allergic reactions.
remedies.image_alt: Melaleuca alternifolia herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Mentha x piperita creams are often used to help with bad breath. This is because peppermint, the main active compound in Mentha x piperita, has antibacterial properties that can kill the bacteria that cause bad breath. Mentha x piperita also contains menthol, which helps to freshen breath and reduce inflammation in the mouth. To use Mentha x piperita creams for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue or gums and let it dissolve. You can also use it as a mouthwash by swishing it around in your mouth for 30 seconds to 1 minute before spitting it out. Some people also find it helpful to chew sugar-free gum or hard candy containing Mentha x piperita after eating or drinking to help stimulate saliva production, which can help wash away bacteria that cause bad breath. If you use Mentha x piperita creams regularly, you may notice that your bad breath improves and your mouth feels fresher. You may also notice that your gums and tongue feel less inflamed and sore. However, it's worth noting that Mentha x piperita creams may not completely eliminate bad breath, especially if it's caused by a medical condition. If your bad breath persists or is accompanied by other symptoms such as dry mouth, bleeding gums, or a bad taste in your mouth, you should speak with your dentist or doctor to rule out any underlying health issues.
remedies.image_alt: Mentha x piperita herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Syzygium aromaticum creams have been used for centuries to help with bad breath. The active ingredient, eugenol, is responsible for its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Eugenol also has a deodorizing effect, which helps to eliminate the odor-causing bacteria in the mouth. Additionally, Syzygium aromaticum creams contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe mouth ulcers and gum inflammation. If you're experiencing bad breath, try applying a small amount of Syzygium aromaticum cream to your gums and tongue. You can also mix a few drops of the cream with water and use it as a mouthwash. To get the most out of it, use the cream after brushing your teeth and flossing. You can also try using it at night before bed to help reduce morning bad breath. When you start using Syzygium aromaticum cream, you may notice that your bad breath becomes less frequent and less severe. You may also notice that your gums and tongue feel healthier and more comfortable. In some cases, the cream may even help to reduce plaque and tartar buildup on your teeth. However, it's essential to note that Syzygium aromaticum cream is not a replacement for regular oral hygiene practices. You still need to brush and floss regularly to maintain good oral health.
remedies.image_alt: Syzygium aromaticum herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale creams, also known as ginger creams, have been traditionally used to help with bad breath. This is due to the presence of properties and constituents such as zingibain, a compound that has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The antibacterial properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria in the mouth, which can cause bad breath, while the anti-inflammatory effects soothe and calm the gums and mouth tissues.  To use Zingiber officinale creams for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue or gums after brushing your teeth. You can also mix it with your toothpaste or mouthwash for added benefits. When using the cream, it is essential to follow a consistent oral hygiene routine, including regular brushing, flossing, and tongue scraping.  By applying the cream and maintaining good oral hygiene, you can likely experience a reduction in bad breath, as well as a decrease in inflammation and bacteria growth. Your gums and mouth tissues may feel soothed and calm, and you may notice an improvement in your overall oral health. Additionally, the antibacterial properties of the cream may help to prevent the formation of plaque and tartar, which can contribute to bad breath.
remedies.image_alt: Zingiber officinale herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Cymbopogon citratus creams, also known as lemongrass creams, contain compounds like citral and geraniol, which have antimicrobial properties. These properties help reduce the growth of bacteria in the mouth, which is often the cause of bad breath. The citral in lemongrass creams has also been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and calm irritated gums and mouth tissues. To use Cymbopogon citratus creams for bad breath, apply a small amount to your gums and teeth after brushing your teeth, ideally in the morning and before bed. You can also mix a few drops of the cream with your toothpaste for added benefits. As you apply the cream, you may feel a slight tingling sensation due to the antiseptic properties of lemongrass. If you have sensitive teeth or gums, start with a small amount and gradually increase as needed. Taking these actions can lead to a reduction in bad breath caused by bacterial overgrowth in the mouth. You may also notice improvements in gum health and a decrease in mouth inflammation. However, it's essential to note that Cymbopogon citratus creams are not a replacement for regular oral hygiene practices, such as brushing and flossing. You should continue to brush and floss as usual to maintain good oral health.
remedies.image_alt: Cymbopogon citratus herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinnamomum verum creams have been used for centuries to combat bad breath, also known as halitosis. This is due to the presence of cinnamaldehyde, a key constituent that possesses antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Cinnamaldehyde helps to reduce the growth of bacteria in the mouth, particularly in the gums and tongue, which are common causes of bad breath. The anti-inflammatory properties also reduce redness and swelling in the gums, creating a healthier environment. To use Cinnamomum verum cream for bad breath, apply a small amount to your tongue and gums after brushing your teeth. Leave it on for a few minutes before spitting it out. You can also mix it with water to make a mouthwash. When using Cinnamomum verum cream, you can expect to notice a reduction in bad breath within a few days, as the antibacterial properties start to work. Your gums may also become less inflamed, and you may experience a fresher, cleaner feeling in your mouth. However, it's essential to note that Cinnamomum verum cream may not completely eliminate bad breath, especially if it's caused by an underlying medical condition. Regular use may also help to prevent bad breath from occurring in the future.
remedies.image_alt: Cinnamomum verum herbal creams for bad breath

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea purpurea creams are a natural remedy that may help alleviate bad breath. They contain compounds like alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties can help reduce the growth of bacteria in the mouth, which is a common cause of bad breath. The anti-inflammatory properties may also help soothe and calm the gums and mucous membranes, making it easier to swallow and reducing irritation.  If you want to try using Echinacea purpurea creams for bad breath, here's what you can do. First, look for products that contain high-quality, organic Echinacea purpurea extract. Choose a cream that is fragrance-free and hypoallergenic to avoid any irritation. Apply a thin layer to your gums, tongue, and the roof of your mouth, ideally after brushing and flossing your teeth. You can also try swishing the cream around your mouth for 30 seconds to a minute before spitting it out.  When using Echinacea purpurea creams for bad breath, you can expect to see an improvement in your oral health. The reduction in bacterial growth and inflammation may lead to fresher breath and a healthier mouth. You may also notice a decrease in gum inflammation and sensitivity. However, it's essential to note that Echinacea purpurea creams are not a substitute for regular oral hygiene practices, such as brushing, flossing, and visiting your dentist regularly. They should be used in conjunction with these practices to achieve optimal results.
remedies.image_alt: Echinacea purpurea herbal creams for bad breath

intro_desc: People with gum disease often struggle with bad breath, which can be embarrassing and affect their daily lives. When bacteria in the mouth multiply, they release smelly gases that cause bad breath. This can happen because gum disease weakens the gums, allowing bacteria to grow easily and feed on food particles. As a result, sufferers may feel self-conscious and anxious about speaking or being around others. They may even avoid social events, eat alone, or feel like they don't deserve to be close to loved ones. Bad breath can also lead to feelings of insecurity, low self-esteem, and even depression. Gum disease sufferers may feel like they're living in isolation, even when they're surrounded by people.  The constant worry and shame of having bad breath can be overwhelming. It's not just about the smell; it's about the impact it has on a person's life and relationships. Sufferers may try various treatments, such as mouthwashes, toothpastes, and antibiotics, but these often have side effects or don't provide lasting relief.  Herbal creams are a natural alternative that can help alleviate bad breath in gum disease sufferers. These creams work by reducing bacterial growth in the mouth, soothing inflamed gums, and promoting a healthy oral environment. When applied topically, they can kill bacteria and prevent their multiplication, thus reducing the production of smelly gases. By addressing the root cause of bad breath, herbal creams can provide long-lasting relief and help sufferers regain their confidence and self-esteem.
